title: 15,500 BBY

'''15,500 Before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] ([[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]])''' was a year in the [[Indecta Era]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. While the expansion of the [[Galactic community|Republic-known galaxy]] had come to a near halt with the outbreak of the [[First Alsakan Conflict]] [[17,000 BBY|fifteen hundred years earlier]], [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] and [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] eventually returned to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|outer frontier]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. 15,500 BBY, Republic scouts [[First contact with Duinuogwuin|encountered]] the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Frightened, the scouts hastily retreated to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], with hundreds of the oft-called "Star Dragons" in pursuit. The Republic [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Attack on Coruscant|attacked]], but peace was forged between the Duinuogwuin [[Below the Belt: Philosophy|philosopher]] [[Borz'Mat'oh]] and [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Fillorean]]. Together, as part of the peace, they established the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].

==Proem==
The rapid expansion of the [[Galactic community|known galaxy]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] had nearly ceased with the outbreak of the [[First Alsakan Conflict]] in [[17,000 BBY]]. This conflict marked the beginning of the [[Indecta Era]] for the Republic, but [[Scout/Legends|exploration]] eventually resumed. New [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] were being encountered on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|rimward]] [[Unknown Regions/Legends|frontier]] of known [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. The Republic had also been changing culturally, with the establishment of the [[Celebratus Archive]] on [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] in [[16,782 BBY]]<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> and the creation of the first [[Protosaber|proto-]][[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in the years leading up to 15,500 BBY.<ref name="NEC" />

==The galaxy in 15,500 BBY==
In 15,500 BBY, Republic [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] exploring the Outer Rim traversed near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]].<ref name="EA" /> There, they encountered the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]], fifty [[Meter/Legends|meter]]–long "Star Dragons" that had the ability to travel through the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of space and expel atomic fire from their mouths. The [[First contact with Duinuogwuin|first encounter]] was disastrous, as the scouts were stricken with fear. Acting in haste, they retreated to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The "Star Dragons" misinterpreted the fear, and hundreds followed in pursuit. Reaching the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital-world]], the Duinuogwuin [[Attack on Coruscant|attacked]] the planet and devastated the cityscape. However, the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Fillorean]] was able to open negotiations with the Duinuogwuin [[Below the Belt: Philosophy|philosopher]] [[Borz'Mat'oh]], brokering peace. As part of the deal, the two established the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].<ref name="NEC" />

==Impact==
The Duinuogwuin became one of many species that either came in contact or became incorporated into the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] community during the Indecta Era.<ref name="EA" /> The peace brokered by Fillorean and Borz'Mat'oh lasted between the Republic and the Duinuogwuin,<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> and some of them even became Jedi. One such Star Dragon, named [[Willm Lywin]], established the [[Teyan Praxeum]] on [[Teya IV]] in [[4600 BBY]].<ref name="The Most Dangerous Foe">{{JournalCite|11|The Most Dangerous Foe}}</ref> On the University of Coruscant's main campus, statues of both Fillorean and Borz'Mat'oh were erected, and the university itself remained for thousands of years.<ref name="CCW" />

==Notable events==
*[[Duinuogwuin Contention]], which included the attack on Coruscant.<ref name="NEC" />
*The founding of the University of Coruscant.<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Although the year itself was not explicitly mentioned in ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', the [[2003]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[roleplaying game]] supplement first introduced the Duinuogwuin Contention into ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]].<ref name="CCW" /> The date was first provided in the [[2005]] publication [[The New Essential Chronology]], wherein further details of the conflict were mentioned.<ref name="NEC" /> 15,500 BBY later received mention in [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.<ref name="EA" /><ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force real-life book">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
